# jsm-tui

> Jira Service Management toolkit for the terminal. Two binaries from one codebase: `jsm-tui` (interactive TUI for humans) and `jsm-cli` (non-interactive JSON CLI for agents and scripts). Written in Go. Targets Jira Data Center / Server with PAT or basic auth.

## For LLMs and agents

- [Agent install guide](docs/agent-usage.md): **start here on first encounter.** Six-step install flow — collect bootstrap values from the user, write config, install + customize the skill template, verify, persist memory. Self-contained for any harness (Claude, Cursor, Codex, Aider, pi).
- [Skill template](skill/SKILL.md): templated skill with `__PLACEHOLDER__` markers. The install guide tells the agent how to download this, substitute the user's values, and save the result to the harness's skills location. After install, this is the day-to-day reference — generic on disk, personalized per user via substitution.
- [CLI source](cmd/jsm-cli/main.go): single-file cobra-based JSON CLI.

## For humans

- [Installation](docs/installation.md): platform-specific install steps.
- [Configuration](docs/configuration.md): config file format and options.
- [Usage](docs/usage.md): keyboard shortcuts, navigation, common flows.

## Reference

- [README](README.md): project overview and feature list.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): version history.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/arch-err/jsm-tui): source and issues.
